title: Green Poison Outbreak
summary: The Black Friday biological outbreak that breaks public order, overwhelms response systems and begins the central crisis of The Division universe.

claims.text: The official story recap says Green Poison breaks out on Black Friday.
Following the outbreak, order breaks down and systems begin to fail.
Ubisoft's glossary connects the Dollar Flu to early-December deaths, quarantine, riots and New York's collapse.

paragraphs.text: The outbreak begins during the Black Friday period and rapidly becomes more than a health emergency: public order and essential systems begin to fail.

timeline.label: Black Friday — Green Poison begins the franchise crisis

verification.notes: The timeline uses a relative Black Friday label because this batch does not establish an exact calendar year from direct game evidence.
